title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; published to npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models for chat, tools, retrieval, and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model manager, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around Ollama written in Go; offers chat history, syntax highlighting, and fuzzy model search.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a Copilot-style pair-programmer with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama supporting Kotlin, Scala, and Android; available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic access to Ollama’s chat, embed, and pull endpoints.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset—use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-cog
summary: Cog container that packages Ollama for easy Replicate deployments with automatic model caching.

title: ollama-sdks-net
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama supporting C#, F#, and PowerShell; NuGet: Ollama.Sdk.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Flask app showing how to build a RAG chatbot using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model to your server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for private AI assistance using local Ollama models; supports note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to spin up GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s HTTP API with GenServer-backed connection pooling; Hex.pm: ollama_ex.

title: ollama-model-gallery
summary: Community-curated collection of ready-to-use Modelfiles for niche domains (medical, legal, coding) beyond official library.
